key_numbers.label: Insurance Premiums Tax Rate Reduction state receipts decrease

events.description: Legislative Adjustments to Consensus Estimates for FY 2023 through FY 2024
Consensus Revenue Estimating Group meeting to consider revisions

evidence.quote: Estimated receipts for the two fiscal years combined were decreased by $481.8 million relative to the April 20 estimate.
A reduction of $6.3 million is attributable to total taxes, and a decrease of $475.5 million is attributable to other revenues.
This reduction is anticipated to reduce state receipts by $18.4 million per year, beginning in FY 2025.
